title: Create: Unify
description: Material Library for addons "avoiding the ingot dupe for create addons"
body:
# Create: Unify  
### Overview  

Material Libaray for addons "avoiding the ingot dupe for create addons"  
simple enough a addon that adds materials such as metal, steel, cast iron, and/or more for the said addon  

**Current Materials**  
only metals at the moment  

![Create: Unify](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b5ca8bba8ff16431d56df9f1b7b7eca99733f7d.png)

**_ORE_**:  
- Platinum  
- Lead  
- Silver  
- Tin  
- Uranium  
- Aluminum  
- Nickel  
- Tungsten  

**_ALLOY_**:  
- Steel  
- Electrum  
- Bronze  
- Cast Iron  
- Invar  
- Constantan  
- Wrought Iron  
- Tarnished Gold  


**Currently Planned to be added**  
- Rose Gold  
- Casings (likely not)  
- Coke Coal  
- & more  

if you wanna suggest/report issue anything like that please send them in here [[My Discord Server]](https://discord.gg/XAU8pcxEwu) as I will notice them 90% of the time unlike github  

if you wanna look at decor using these id Suggest looking at [Create: Design n' Decor](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-design-n-decor) with some planned at the moment
